## Safety checklist

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, private keys, or credentials.
- [ ] No real resume, cover letter, job tracker, contact, or application data.
- [ ] No production Google Sheet, Drive folder, account, or application IDs.
- [ ] Mock data only.
- [ ] Human approval remains required before any submission behavior.
